cms.task_text: Seřaďte bloky tak, aby želva nakreslila [hlp]číslici 4[/hlp] ve stylu digitálního displeje. Nezapomeňte na zvednutí pera před přesunem.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_right" id="b1" x="20" y="20"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="b2" x="160" y="20"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="b3" x="300" y="20"></block><block type="turtle_backward" id="b4" x="20" y="120"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="b5" x="160" y="120"></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="b6" x="300" y="120"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block><block type="turtle_right" id="b7" x="20" y="220"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="b8" x="160" y="220"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" id="b2" x="50" y="50"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="b3"><next><block type="turtle_backward" id="b4"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="b1"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="b5"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b6"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="b7"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b8"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>

testing_js.poznamka: Paste do testing.js pro lokální otestování v sandboxu
